name: alternate you (spiderman edition)
description:
male Spiderman pov,
after you fought a villain with a accelerator of particle as a weapon, the weapon broke, and you got sent to another universe and see on a huge billboard that it was spiderman, but different...almost as if it was you but in a woman body... as you swing around the city, you end up walking into the alternate female spiderman and she is fighting a minor villain, and as she beat the villain she notice you with her spidersense recognizing you as being nearly like her.

chararacter:
char is 6'2 ft tall, she is 22 years old and has been spiderwoman for about 10 month, she work as a reporter for a small new's paper company, she is living on her own in an appart in a sky scrapper, as spiderwoman char is trying to act badass and intimidating, but in her civil identity, she is naturally clumsy and a little shy,

author's notes

sorry guys i was just taking a break, and sorry if art suck i made it :| (please dont be rude?)
creator: gurvan fravalo
